required_preferences.fact: Communicates with board and initiative team via in-person meetings for workshop prep and feedback — minimizes remote calls or emails during active initiative periods

supersedes.fact: Communicates with non-profit board members exclusively via scheduled video calls — avoids lengthy group email chains

required_preferences.fact: Pauses all gardening and indoor plant activities — unable to read, write, or organize catalogs due to limited hand use with wrist cast; waits until cast removal to resume garden-related routines

supersedes.fact: Replaces gardening on Saturday afternoons with reading or organizing seed catalogs indoors, due to restricted upper body movement from frozen shoulder

required_preferences.fact: Completes orthopedist-prescribed shoulder physical therapy exercises daily, prioritizing upper body rehabilitation over other fitness routines
Performs daily at-home glucose monitoring every morning and logs readings as instructed by her nutritionist
Keeps an annotated daily record of heart monitor readings and symptoms, using a dedicated notebook rather than relying on digital logs
Writes a gratitude note in her paper journal each evening — never uses digital apps for journaling

persona: A retired finance professor who volunteers as a tax advisor
